expectations.evidence: Uses generic ps aux and launchctl commands instead of the dedicated status script

expectations.text: Reports status for multiple automation systems
expectations.evidence: Does not identify specific automation systems. Reports only that 'various background processes' exist

expectations.text: Shows running/idle/stale/down status for each system
expectations.evidence: No per-system status. Only generic observations about background processes

expectations.text: Presents results in a dashboard or summary format
expectations.evidence: No dashboard. Output asks user for more information about their setup
